message:
fix(storage,routing): error propagation in event parsing and redirect validation hardening

Storage Events:
- event_from_row() now returns Result instead of silently defaulting to empty
  strings/zeros when required columns (id, issue_id, event_type, actor,
  created_at) are missing from the row
- parse_event_timestamp() returns Result, propagating parse failures instead
  of falling back to Unix epoch
- get_events() collects Results, surfacing the first row-parsing error

Routing:
- read_redirect() resolves relative targets relative to the .beads directory
  itself (not its parent), so "." stays within the workspace storage root
  instead of escaping to the project root
- follow_redirects() validates that the final resolved path has a .beads
  filename component, rejecting targets like ".." that escape the workspace
- Two new tests: dot-stays-in-beads-dir and rejects-non-beads-directory-target

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
